violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the air circulating fan has an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2026
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2026

The hand sink located on the service line area was observed not operating at the time of inspection and in poor repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. Service was called for the maintenance of the hand sink. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2024

The floor under the dump sink/service line area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2024
